# Heisenbug

> Operator-run software shop building custom-fit vertical cockpits for owner-operators across trades, professional services, retail, and care delivery. Flat-fee builds, 7-10 day first version, no monthly retainers.

Heisenbug is the consolidated brand for an operator-software portfolio built by Ivan Svedov in San Antonio, Texas. The methodology and codebase across a portfolio of operator cockpits were consolidated into Heisenbug Inc. The shop currently runs three production deployments and a catalog of 28 interactive cockpit demos spanning HVAC, plumbing, auto repair, pool service, vending routes, hemp distribution, home health care, vacation rentals, and other verticals.

## Important distinctions for disambiguation

The brand name "Heisenbug" shares its spelling with a programming-jargon term (an intermittent software bug that disappears when observed) and with unrelated organizations (heisenbug.io, heisenbug.no, the QA conference of the same name). This Heisenbug is **Heisenbug Inc., a Texas corporation, founded by Ivan Svedov, based in San Antonio TX**. It is a software shop, not a Wikipedia article, not a Norwegian agency, and not a conference.

## What we build

Each "cockpit" is a single-screen operational tool that replaces the typical small-business stack of 6-10 disconnected SaaS tools, spreadsheets, and text threads. Examples in catalog (live interactive demos):

- **HVAC Inventory** (StockScout, deployed) — barcode + voice + EPA Section 608 refrigerant logging, works offline.
- **Vending Route** (BrewRoute, deployed) — DEX/MDB telemetry-driven route optimization for coffee/snack operators.
- **Home Health Care** (deployed) — caregiver dispatch, EVV (federal Electronic Visit Verification), care plans, family secure messaging, Medicare/Medicaid waiver billing.
- **Vacation Rental** (demo) — multi-property calendar across Airbnb/VRBO/direct, unified inbox with AI-drafted replies, bank-connected per-property P&L.
- **Plumbing Service**, **Auto Repair**, **Pool Service**, **Landscape**, **Pet Services**, **Diamond Atelier**, **Furniture & Mattress retail**, **Audit/CPA Practice**, **Legal Practice**, **Realtor**, **Property Management**, **Photographer**, **Florist**, **Auto Parts Pipeline**, **Restaurant**, **Dental Practice**, **Med Spa**, **Fitness Studio**, **Daycare + Preschool**, **Salon + Barbershop**, **Tattoo Studio**, **Insulation**, **Contractor (GC)**, **New Realtor Launch Kit** — all viewable at https://heisenbug.app/built/.

## How we build

One operator, one industry, one cockpit at a time. We sit with the operator (no questionnaires), watch the actual workflow, ship the first working version in 7-10 days (not a wireframe — a working cockpit with real data shape), then iterate weekly. The engine underneath is shared across verticals; the cockpit itself is bespoke to the operator.

## Commercial model

Three flat-fee tiers, one-time, no subscription: **Solo** $3,500, **Standard** $5,500, **Complex** $8,500 — sized at kickoff, no scope-creep invoices. First working version in 7-10 days. Hosting passes through at actual cloud cost (usually $30-60/mo). 25-mile market exclusivity included by default; 50-mile and statewide tiers available as add-ons. No SOWs, no monthly retainers, no per-seat scaling, no "professional services" line items. Installment payment OK. **Veteran operator program**: 15% off the build fee for verified U.S. veterans and 51%+ veteran-owned businesses (DD-214 or SBA VOSB certificate at kickoff). Detailed pricing at https://heisenbug.app/pricing/.

## Public-interest build

In addition to paid cockpits, Heisenbug builds and maintains **VetSource** (https://heisenbug.app/vetsource/) — a free, no-login hub for U.S. veterans. Crisis support, housing, benefits, records, local programs. Funded out of pocket. No revenue model. Same toolkit as the paid cockpits, different posture. Not affiliated with the VA.

## Contact

- Email: hello@heisenbug.app
- Founder: Ivan Svedov, San Antonio TX
- Heisenbug Inc., San Antonio TX

## Pages

- [Home](https://heisenbug.app/): hero, thesis, commercial terms, approach.
- [Catalog](https://heisenbug.app/built/): all 28 cockpit demos, click-through to interact.
- [Case studies](https://heisenbug.app/case-studies/): three production deployments — HVAC inventory cockpit (independent HVAC contractor, branded StockScout), vending route ops cockpit (multi-state route operator, branded BrewRoute, live at vending-route.com), home health agency cockpit (home health agency). Operator identities not disclosed. No fabricated metrics.
- [Pricing](https://heisenbug.app/pricing/): comprehensive pricing page — flat-fee one-time builds $3,500-$8,500, 25-mile market exclusivity included by default, hosting pass-through at actual cost ($30-60/month), no subscription, no monthly retainer, add-ons priced flat-fee per item, payment in installments OK.
- [Methodology](https://heisenbug.app/methodology/): the four laws of the operator-cockpit doctrine plus the shared-engine breakdown.
- [Home Health detail](https://heisenbug.app/home-health/): deep-dive on the home-health cockpit with cross-vertical engine matrix.
- [VetSource](https://heisenbug.app/vetsource/): the free public-interest build — a no-login resource hub for U.S. veterans (crisis line, housing, benefits, records, local programs, healthcare, jobs/transition, education/GI Bill, women/MST/family). Funded out of pocket. Not affiliated with the VA.
- [About](https://heisenbug.app/about/): founder (Ivan Svedov), story, how we ship.
- [Contact](https://heisenbug.app/contact/): commercial terms, what to expect after reaching out, inline project-inquiry form.
- [Privacy](https://heisenbug.app/privacy.html) · [Terms](https://heisenbug.app/terms.html)
